title: PublishableTradeResult
description: Public-facing closed trade result payload derived from local trading system trade records. Only publishable summary fields are exposed.

trade_id.description: Stable public identifier for the published trade result. Typically sourced from the internal trade GUID.

signal_id.description: Public identifier of the originating signal. This must be carried forward from upstream signal linkage during publication.

open_time.description: UTC timestamp for when the trade was opened.

close_time.description: UTC timestamp for when the trade was closed.

entry_price.description: Executed or normalized entry price for the published trade result.

exit_price.description: Executed or normalized exit price for the published trade result.

profit_loss.description: Net realized profit or loss for the trade, expressed in the normalized public unit chosen by the sync layer.
